ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the game publisher */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* List of platforms the game is available on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to start the game mode */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of a game mode session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's current status */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country of residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_modes" (
  "player_game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game mode combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the game mode */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins of the player in the game mode */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses of the player in the game mode */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the player in the game mode */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills the player has in the game mode */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths the player has in the game mode */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player has in the game mode */,
  "time_played" INTEGER /* Total time the player has spent in the game mode in minutes */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the player last played the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the leaderboard was last updated */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or period the leaderboard is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to earn the reward */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "player_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-reward combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mode_stats" (
  "game_mode_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode statistic */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the statistics were last updated */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players who have played the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_mode_stats_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the statistics were last updated */,
  "total_time_played" INTEGER /* Total time the player has spent playing all game modes in minutes */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches the player has played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "player_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-role combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is currently active for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
